name: Souffleed Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt chocolate in a double boiler. When melted, set aside to cool.
3. Melt butter and whisk into the chocolate.
4. Grease a 9½ by 1½ inch false-bottomed cake pan with flour, shaking off excess.
5. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form; add sugar tablespoon by tablespoon until all is incorporated.
6. Lightly beat egg yolks with a fork and fold into the beaten egg whites.
7. Continue beating with an electric mixer for 1 more minute or until completely mixed.
8. Sift half of cornstarch onto the batter and fold in half of the melted chocolate and butter mixture.
9. Fold remaining ingredients into the batter.
10. Pour batter into prepared cake pan and bake for 30 minutes. The inside should remain moist.
11. Cool cake for 10 minutes in the pan. Loosen edges with a spatula and remove from the pan.
12. Turn the cake upside down onto a plate so the slightly crusty top is hidden at the bottom.
13. Dust the top with confectioners' sugar (use a doily for design effects) just before serving.
Yield: 8 servings
